Fixed improperly nested BIBL elements in the \"Politicorum Libri\" entry: the original had multiple nested <BIBL> tags inside the parent BIBL (for \"Monita\", \"De Magnirudine Romana\", \"De Constantia\"). These were flattened so that the TITLE elements (Monita, Exempla politica via VOLUME, De Magnirudine Romana, De Constantia) sit directly within the single enclosing BIBL, since they belong to the same multi-work entry sharing one format and price. 2. Likewise fixed the improperly nested <BIBL> inside the \"de Amphitheatro\" entry, moving the \"de Amphitheatris extra Romam\" TITLE directly into the parent BIBL. 3. Corrected the inconsistent tag <PRICE>48. xr.</PRICE> to <PRIZE>48. xr.</PRIZE> to match the consistent tagging used for all other price entries in the document. Note: the mojibake/garbled OCR characters (e.g. √¬º, √‚Ä†) were left as-is since they represent original encoding artifacts in the source text and are not XML structural errors."}

parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed improperly nested BIBL elements in the "Politicorum Libri" entry: the original had multiple nested <BIBL> tags inside the parent BIBL (for "Monita", "De Magnirudine Romana", "De Constantia"). These were flattened so that the TITLE elements (Monita, Exempla politica via VOLUME, De Magnirudine Romana, De Constantia) sit directly within the single enclosing BIBL, since they belong to the same multi-work entry sharing one format and price. 2. Likewise fixed the improperly nested <BIBL> inside the "de Amphitheatro" entry, moving the "de Amphitheatris extra Romam" TITLE directly into the parent BIBL. 3. Corrected the inconsistent tag <PRICE>48. xr.</PRICE> to <PRIZE>48. xr.</PRIZE> to match the consistent tagging used for all other price entries in the document. Note: the mojibake/garbled OCR characters (e.g. √¬º, √‚Ä†) were left as-is since they represent original encoding artifacts in the source text and are not XML structural errors.
